name: French Mint Creams
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the butter and powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Add the melted chocolate and beat until combined.
3. Add each egg to the mixture one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in the peppermint extract and vanilla extract.
5. Line 18 muffin cups with cupcake liners.
6. Place a vanilla wafer on the bottom of each liner.
7. Fill each liner about three-quarters full with the chocolate mixture.
8. Top each with a dollop of whipped cream and a maraschino cherry.
9. Freeze until firm, then transfer to plastic bags for storage.
